steps.title: Mark the consequence
steps.content: The passage says box-modeled objects have precise proportions but lack organic realism. Because of that limitation, later processes such as UV surface mapping are needed to create believable film assets.

steps.title: Use a result transition
steps.content: Choice B signals similarity, Choice C signals summary, and Choice D signals contrast. The relationship here is that one condition leads to a necessary next step. The answer is A.
